textByHashes.a1238597df64c079fd9c67999764571a407f724b: Oh, it's just the adventurer, phew! Things can be scary around here, I've seen some weeeeeiiiird stuff in that cavern.
textByHashes.ba466b9e06d85a840290eec8592a0df5829a8b06: Oh no, now I'm thinking about it again!
textByHashes.36b6fb06edaffbae97142bc15228618c699a4b2c: It's a mine. It's special but dangerous, things move around and the mine could collapse at any moment!.
textByHashes.abd68581baea255ae8a045463b7260e98a83ccf6: I'd say you'll need at least level 50 Mining to be capable.
textByHashes.4ecd00cc80c1f04590fa6fb462d25ba28bbeb332: The main idea is to chip down the big boulders, in order to find the fragments inside. Deliver them to me and I'll show you some minin' tips to help you get better at it.
textByHashes.0c0a460936e99a13344339c59d5d65681fcc5497: I have a handy supply of heat-proof water containers. I'll give them out to anyone going in with bit of water inside. They only hold so much though.
textByHashes.f58c565447a4698d94ed8f9d0ca2229d9b49e685: I reckon you could harden the lava with it! Just throw a bit of water on it. Make yourself a path, but be careful, they won't last forever.
textByHashes.0427be34d1eb6fa13ad2c7b4097ba2a5b276b41b: Uh oh, there is one more thing, but it hurts. My backside has never felt the same since, one of the reasons I don't dare go in there anymore. There are some gas holes around, just feel 'em.
textByHashes.22393807f29b9560723add8248d591f56cbad0d5: Don't let it collapse!! It's petrifying, it will stick with you forever. The rumbles create a flashback in my mind, arghhh.
textByHashes.91509df468d5f6f84cb9a0ab2c98d9fb5f8f152f: There are some vents and chambers in there. Do better than I did with them, you want around a 50% gas level in each chamber.
textByHashes.f28a6f06446fd9ed9a3325db1ef3530dc0291d03: There are 3 in total, we spent awhile coming up with names, such as 'Vent west of the pillar near the entrance on the left hand side', but decided A, B and C would be easier.
textByHashes.ffe8254c9bf87e3c7a3fae403cd7199fc99f5872: Yep! That's right. Block the chamber to let gas build up, unblock 'em to let gas out. Any creatures in there will cause instability too.
textByHashes.e59b21758ae32046ec4a6cdb2527d310e052f6f1: Oh, also, if you have more than one rock to mine, keep them going at roughly the same pace too. Everything gets a bit wobbly if you proceed too quickly down one channel.
textByHashes.33e08b4d8e572ed4af2c95ad8dbffd5c31e1758b: It is bad, very bad in there. If you're not prepared, you will be done for. Wouldn't catch me in there.
textByHashes.63bac85ff52744d38bc1bd5f927cbe09c2d928b1: Look out for the Lava beasts, they'll throw projectiles at anyone they see. You'll have stalacmites falling on you, fire jumping out the lava towards you. Seriously, you're insane.
textByHashes.fd3fa620a2bbf5a216225ea24edb337b252c000c: There are some crazy things down there, I don't think you're capable.
textByHashes.62c3b0da788fa02c08ffa4f8d3b9db4d036ad4d7: Well luckily for you, or rather, unlucky for you, I'll let you go inside as you've definitely got the mining skills.
textByHashes.bd232e7eae11df6f574da3ec2b00b48ac200f6cd: I'll have to charge you though - upkeep of this place ain't cheap and cheerful. I'll need 30 Numulites for one visit or 3,000 for unlimited trips.
textByHashes.f09f866cf1aa7612c6aedd077de0f3a83c268659: Thanks . That will grant you access to the mine. You're a crazy one.
textByHashes.32bfc8b6460539f4e5017018a76e5470557512a8: Thanks . That will grant you permanent access to the mine. You're a crazy one.
textByHashes.68940d974d821f79296cbcc4dff073f70b35993b: You've already paid the entrance fee too, so you can head right on in.
textByHashes.dc4694383a9d1ecfa5fc70244548196cc9fe0490: I've got some of your stuff that you left here earlier. You'd better deal with it before trying to go into the cavern again.
textByHashes.ef2bd2b28bd8fc0305beeedf8e4ea06d9eb45acd: Sorry, I've got nothing for you. I'm not sure what you'd have been doing in there anyway, since I wouldn't expect to let you in.
textByHashes.683a0c37eac1c10df44dd585f36d004e4d021db2: Sorry, I've got nothing for you. If I had some of your stuff earlier, but you died before collecting it, it'd be lost.
textByHashes.f36660b0f8ef6615134656425db403bda90e69fd: There are some crazy things down there, I don't think you're capable so I'll let you keep your Numulites.
textByHashes.456d792e68531b1607daabc3a863a4699b01e5bd: It doesn't look like you have 30 Numulites with you unfortunately.
textByHashes.43771fec0d1b498bdf9cbb94a5831b07cd0ecc5a: You've already paid up! You can head right on in. Better you than me...
textByHashes.f9264b4c87b6647ee86d5c28af39a9a201b79879: Sorry, I'll need paying before I can return your stuff.
textByHashes.6f4366392f1dcbe29365140726e5c2052bd70a0c: Sorry , you won't last a minute in there. You got to prove yourself as a capable archeologist, and be good at the minin'.
textByHashes.22f2de20757bfef6113ebc1845d79db0d90f6500: Sorry I can't let people head in mid way through a mine out session. It's not safe and will cause mine collapse!
textByHashes.a7b46cc8c3c3ced8f6172a465229a35b771b52f9: Sorry , I cannot allow someone to go in there without paying first. Come see me.
textByHashes.7aa71d9944c448d5b186f53b2f1587b5ac7192c7: You should probably pick up the stuff you left in there earlier before you return. Come and see me.
textByHashes.a5b95869d9490a7b890de97e9a26669eb31a8e5c: Well why am I going to reward you for that?! Might wanna contribute next time. I am not standin' out here for nothin'.
textByHashes.ca862d7ca56a8544dc32dfd1d6bc0acc5499a901: I'll give you a bit of minin' trainin' and I'll remember the contribution you've made.
textByHashes.273141b12e6021f0f1e9784a3846068d6f1cc6c1: I'll quickly take those fragments off your hands , thank you! I'll give you a bit of minin' trainin' and I'll remember the contribution you've made.
textByHashes.af45812d9c13d7b0d98923e4ae777881f97e714d: has started up a mine! Join him down there now!
textByHashes.a4ce6a3e438beac86db9b9541402c3a77ba06ddc: has started up a mine! Join her down there now!
textByHashes.b25b582fa8006bf57f8a6b89395db7cafe1111d0: has started up a mine! Join them down there now!
textByHashes.e01263917191c14c3cd558f8e87adbcfbb2d3ba1: Woah, what is that you've got there?!
textByHashes.193af952bd6eecdf767a0dfca679de3a03929c0d: That's not just any broken pickaxe, it's a dragon one! They're really rare!
textByHashes.27895e8ad8d3f502b504752e0e1052d971438eb6: I have no idea how that ended up in your ore pack, but you can keep it, it's broken anyway.
textByHashes.ffb3cb2583ae95d7540e97a2e7ad2f005794e27f: Maybe you can find someone to help you repair it! I've heard tales that some dwarves used to fix pickaxes.
textByHashes.5af126f0236630b90af84f75eb543bef84d8f1f7: One of them was called Nurmof. I think he used to reside in the Falador mines. If you're lucky, he could still be there.
textByHashes.1b7cbab462d0430a2841f7b0d5dee200548543d3: Nice one ! In future I'll give you twice as much water when you go into the mine!
textByHashes.58785129f03d07ce837ada90b2c16f2c8b9e095e: Sorry , this a Deadman world. People are fighting all over the shop. No one gets in the mine here!
